goal: 整合 I3 CLI source option 实现

summary.title: 整合 I3 CLI source option 实现
summary.what: Merged the verified I3 CLI source option slice into the canonical workflow branch and updated the workflow control plane so I4 can start.
summary.why: Docs and skill alignment must be based on the merged public CLI behavior rather than an unmerged worker branch.
summary.user_goal: 整合 I3 CLI source option 实现

decisions.chose: Merged worker commit 2ebeb6f with merge commit 7c9c9a2 and recorded I3 verified in the canonical control plane.
decisions.rationale: Preserves the verified I3 implementation and Mainline trace while giving I4 a stable base.
rejected: Launching I4 before canonical I3 merge would make docs/skill updates depend on unmerged implementation state.

decisions.chose: Marked I4 ready only after canonical npm run check passed with 152 tests.
decisions.rationale: I4 documents public CLI behavior and must not race ahead of implementation proof.

review_notes: Actual integration commits are 7c9c9a2 and df36565 on codex/session-sources-workflow; prepare output may include prior workflow stack relative to origin/main.
Canonical verification after merge: npm run check passed with 27 test files and 152 tests; git diff --check passed.

architectural_claims: Codex is the only public source; CLI rejects non-public sources including claude-code.
behavioral_changes: Fixed commands accept --source codex while omitted source remains Codex-equivalent.
status has a read-only fallback for old indexes without source_id.
migration_notes: No write migration is performed by status; old schema status is read-only compatible.
